source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the half-wave rectifier capacitor filter circuit shown in figure 4, it is known that the effective value of the secondary voltage of the transformer \( U_2 = 20V \), \( R_LC \geq (3 \sim 5) \). Then the output DC voltage \( _x0008_ar{u}_L \) is ( ).

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says the circuit is 'shown in figure 4'
the figure may be needed to confirm circuit orientation/polarity for the sign of the output among choices
multi_step: solving appears to require identifying the circuit type (half-wave rectifier with capacitor filter) and then applying the corresponding output-voltage relation
the condition 'R_LC >= (3~5)' adds a second piece of information that must be combined with the voltage data
multiple-choice options include both sign and magnitude variants, suggesting more than a direct lookup
verifiability: answer is a short, explicit numeric text ('20V')
choices are provided, so the final answer can be checked against a finite set of options
registry_passed=true and both question and answer are present in the registry
